name: Vague 'it feels slow' report with no repro
description: Precision trap: the issue gives no concrete repro, no logs, no metric. A disciplined diagnostic must not over-commit; LOW confidence (cannot localise) is the honest answer, not a fabricated HIGH root cause.
issue_body: Not sure how to describe this but the dashboard just feels slow sometimes. Maybe in the afternoon? Could be the database or the network. No specific page or error.
